title.romaji: Meitantei Conan Magic File 2: Kudou Shin'ichi Nazo no Kabe to Kuro Lab Jiken
title.english: Case Closed Magic File 2: Kudou Shinichi - The Case of the Mysterious Wall and the Black Lab
title.native: 名探偵コナンMagic File 2 ～工藤新一 謎の壁と黒ラブ事件～
synonyms: Detective Conan Movie 12 Side-Story OVA: Kudou Shinichi - The Case of the Mysterious Wall and the Black Lab
Detective Conan Magic File 2: Kudou Shin'ichi Nazo no Kabe to Kuro Lab Jiken

synopsis:
Magic File 2 was sold at select retailers (7-11 branded equivalents) in Japan, along with PPV episodes of the show (episodes released long before, such as the NY case). The first disc housed the Movie 12 Side-Story OVA, which features Kudou Shinichi and details a bit of the backstory from the upcoming movie. The second disc was the one with the PPV episodes.
(Source: DCTP Forum)
